title: Here Come the Marines
writer: Tim Ryan, Charles R. Marion, Jack Crutcher
actors: Leo Gorcey, Huntz Hall, Hanley Stafford
plot: The boys get drafted into the Marines. On their first day in basic training, their commanding officer discovers that Sach's dad is an old war buddy of his, so he makes Sach a sergeant and places him in charge of the boys. While on...
